blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
